g.title: BATT_POS
g.text: Inline 25A AGC fuse within 12 inches of battery terminal. Feeds SSR load input only -- NOT connected to pump directly. 12 AWG minimum for this run (14.1A max pump draw; 25A fuse).

g.title: CABLE_PWR_BATT
g.text: BATT+ to SSR Load(+). Inline 25A AGC fuse within 12 inches of battery. 12 AWG minimum (14.1A max pump draw; 25A fuse). Ring terminal at battery, blade or ring terminal at SSR load terminal.

g.title: DC_SSR
g.text: DC Solid State Relay -- Crydom D1D40 or generic 40A DC-DC SSR

Opto-isolated DC-DC SSR. No mechanical contacts -- PWM-compatible. Control input: 3-32V DC, ~10-15mA draw. Load: 0-60V DC, 40A continuous. Crydom D1D40 rated: control 3-32V, load 0-60V, 40A, 1kHz max switching. Mount to chassis or fuse block -- add small heatsink if duty cycles above 80%. SSR switches ON when ctrl circuit is energized (IGN high + GPO sinks GND). PWM frequency at MaxxECU GPO: 100-500 Hz recommended (smooth speed control, within SSR switching rating).

g.title: CABLE_PWR_PUMP
g.text: SSR Load(-) to Radium hanger pump(+) stud. Switched +12V pump supply. 12 AWG minimum. Route through tunnel/chassis to fuel tank hanger location. Keep clear of exhaust tunnel runs where possible.

g.title: RADIUM_HANGER
g.text: Radium Engineering 20-1170 -- stainless stud electrical terminals
Top-plate external studs -- anti-rotation, hermetically sealed

Radium 20-1170 uses custom stainless steel studs through the top plate (not a multi-pin connector). External connection via ring terminals + anodized acorn nuts. Anti-rotation feature prevents stud from spinning during install. Hermetically sealed and impervious to E85, gasoline, methanol. Ring terminals: 12 AWG crimp ring, M4 or M5 stud diameter (confirm at install). In-tank wiring insulated with ETFE -- chemically resistant to all fuel types. Single pump install (F90000267): re-use OEM pump wiring for signal side or run new 12 AWG from SSR Load(-) directly to pump(+) stud.

g.title: CABLE_GND
g.text: Radium hanger pump(-) stud to chassis ground stud. 12 AWG minimum. Dedicated ground -- do not share with ECU sensor ground bus. Ring terminal at both ends.

g.title: CHASSIS_GND
g.text: Dedicated ground for pump(-) terminal on Radium hanger. Do not share with ECU sensor grounds or other high-current grounds. 12 AWG minimum. Ring terminal, solid bolt to body metal. Separate stud from any signal ground star-point.

g.title: IGN_12V
g.text: Key-on, key-off -- same bus as MaxxECU main power

Feeds SSR Ctrl(+). When key-on, IGN relay energizes, 12V appears at SSR ctrl+. Combined with MaxxECU GPO sinking SSR ctrl-, pump runs. At key-off, IGN relay drops → SSR ctrl+ loses power → SSR opens → pump stops. 22 AWG from IGN bus to SSR Ctrl(+). Short run preferred -- stay near fuse block.

g.title: CABLE_SSR_CTRL_POS
g.text: IGN switched 12V to SSR Ctrl(+). Low current (SSR opto draws ~15mA). 22 AWG sufficient. Short run -- fuse block to SSR.

g.title: MAXXECU_GPO
g.text: MaxxECU RACE -- PWM General Purpose Output
GEN1 low-drive (GND-sinking), max 2A -- GPO pin TBD

MaxxECU GEN1 GPO: active = pulls to GND. When GPO sinks GND, SSR ctrl circuit completes and SSR switches ON. Duty cycle controls pump speed. Assign function in MTune: Outputs → Output config → PWM fuel pump control. Recommended duty table (by MAP/RPM): 65% idle / 80% cruise / 100% WOT. Phase 3 (07K turbo): tune duty table to boost pressure -- 100% under full boost. 22 AWG from GPO pin to SSR Ctrl(-) -- low current (SSR ctrl draws ~10-15mA).

g.title: CABLE_SSR_CTRL_NEG
g.text: MaxxECU GPO to SSR Ctrl(-). PWM signal (GND-sink, 100-500 Hz). 22 AWG. Route from MaxxECU through firewall grommet to SSR location. Shielded wire preferred -- drain to chassis GND at ECU end only. Keep away from ignition coil primaries and injector wires.
